testcase.name: test_get_lead_detail

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'contact_released' in {'activity_timeline': [{'action': 'follow_up_scheduled', 'changes': {'scheduled_at': '2026-03-05T14:00:00', 'type': 'site_visit'}, 'entity_id': 'lead_b6757d581e34', 'entity_type': 'lead', ...}, {'action': 'note_added', 'changes': {'note_type': 'negotiation'}, 'entity_id': 'lead_b6757d581e34', 'entity_type': 'lead', ...}, {'action': 'communication_logged', 'changes': {'channel': 'call', 'direction': 'outbound'}, 'entity_id': 'lead_b6757d581e34', 'entity_type': 'lead', ...}, {'action': 'venue_shortlisted', 'changes': {'venue_id': 'venue_f2b3d31ebb05', 'venue_name': 'The Grand Imperial'}, 'entity_id': 'lead_b6757d581e34', 'entity_type': 'lead', ...}, {'action': 'updated', 'changes': {}, 'entity_id': 'lead_b6757d581e34', 'entity_type': 'lead', ...}], 'area': 'Connaught Place', 'booking_value': None, 'budget': 500000.0, ...}

testcase.name: test_cannot_confirm_without_deal_value
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_managed_concierge.py:253: in test_cannot_confirm_without_deal_value assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 200: {"message":"Lead updated","changes":{"stage":{"from":"negotiation","to":"booking_confirmed"}}} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cannot_confirm_without_commission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_managed_concierge.py:276: in test_cannot_confirm_without_commission assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 200: {"message":"Lead updated","changes":{}} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_add_venue_to_shortlist

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to add to shortlist: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_managed_concierge.py:344: in test_add_venue_to_shortlist assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to add to shortlist: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to add to shortlist: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
